title: ilex paruensis
intro: Ilex paruensis, also known as the Panama holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ilex paruensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against certain diseases. Ilex paruensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
